creator: christop@physik.tu-berlin.de
text:
The port www/trac-accountmanager is quite old. It is at revision 2063 while the repository is at revision 4325.

Using HtDigestStore or HtPasswdStore with www/trac-accountmanager will end in an error: 
"LookupError: unknown encoding: /trac/account"

Upgrading to revision 4325 fixed it.

Fix: 

As a workaround you can delete all account-manager entries from trac.ini, but this way you do not use any features of this plugin. Update the port is the best way to really fix it.
How-To-Repeat: Install www/trac and www/trac-accountmanager, setup an enviroment and try to configure the plugin for HtDigestStore or HtPasswdStore.
